title: PageInfo
description: Pagination envelope returned alongside every character response.

count.description: Number of records returned in this page (`data` length, or 1 when `data` is a single object).

totalPages.description: Total number of pages available for the current filter at the current `pageSize`.

previousPage.description: Absolute URL to the previous page of results, or null on the first page.

nextPage.description: Absolute URL to the next page of results, or null on the last page.
